title: callicoma stutzeri f. subpubescens
intro: Callicoma stutzeri f. subpubescens, also known as the Weeping Peppermint Myrtle or Small-leaved Peppermint Myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Escalloniaceae, native to eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callicoma stutzeri f. subpubescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and support immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
